summary: AdminUserDetails.js Component Refactor Testing Complete - All 15 features verified. Behavior-preserving refactor successfully extracts ~572 lines of User Details UI from App.js to separate AdminUserDetails component. All interactive elements working correctly.

admin_login.details: Admin login with ashleyalt005@gmail.com works correctly

users_section_navigation.details: Navigate to Users section shows table with 50 of 91 users

users_table_phone_email_copy_buttons.details: 50 copy email buttons and 37 copy phone buttons in table

user_row_click_opens_details.details: Clicking user row opens User Details panel with AdminUserDetails component

back_to_users_button.details: Back to Users button (data-testid=back-to-users-btn) returns to table view

user_details_card_fields.details: Name, Email with copy button, Phone with copy button, Status badge, Email Verified status, KYC badge all displayed correctly

password_display_with_toggle.details: Password shows masked (••••••••••••), toggle reveals actual password (e.g., TestPass123!)

change_password_button.details: Change button (data-testid=change-password-btn) present next to password field

view_login_activity_button.details: View Login Activity button (data-testid=view-login-activity-btn) loads auth history card

admin_notes_section.details: Admin Notes section with Edit button (data-testid=edit-notes-btn), textarea, Save/Cancel buttons

tax_hold_management_section.details: Tax Hold Management shows CLEAR or BLOCKED status badge with appropriate buttons

place_tax_hold_button.details: Place Tax Hold button (data-testid=set-tax-hold-btn) shown for users without tax hold

remove_tax_hold_button.details: Remove Tax Hold button (data-testid=remove-tax-hold-btn) shown for users with BLOCKED tax status

accounts_section_with_edit_iban.details: Accounts section displays for users with accounts, Edit IBAN button (data-testid=edit-iban-btn-{id}) present

enable_disable_buttons.details: Disable button for ACTIVE users, Enable button for non-ACTIVE users

delete_user_button_admin_disabled.details: Delete button (data-testid=delete-user-btn) properly disabled with cursor-not-allowed for admin users

refactor_verification.usage_in_app_js: Lines 2192-2226: <AdminUserDetails ... /> with 25 props passed from parent

critical_code_review_comments: Refactor is behavior-preserving - all functionality verified working
AdminUserDetails correctly receives all required props from parent AdminDashboard
All data-testid attributes preserved for testing
Shared components (StatusBadge, KycBadge, CopyPhoneButton, CopyEmailButton) imported from AdminUsersSection.js

test_users_verified.user_with_accounts: Hannan Mohammad Abdul - ACTIVE status, KYC Approved, has accounts with Edit IBAN
test_users_verified.user_with_tax_hold: Multiple users with 🔴 TAX badge - BLOCKED status, €4,157.00 tax due, Remove Tax Hold button
test_users_verified.admin_user: ashleyalt005@gmail.com - Delete button disabled, Disable button visible

context_for_next_testing_agent: AdminUserDetails.js component refactor complete and verified. The component contains ~572 lines extracted from App.js User Details panel. All interactive elements (buttons, toggles, modals) work correctly. Component receives 25 props from parent AdminDashboard including state setters and handlers. No functional changes made - behavior-preserving refactor only.
